items.title: S01E01 - Westworld Destroyed
items.summary: After the events of Westworld, John Moore is assigned to hunt down Simon Quaid who has made off with a collection of androids for his own dangerous purposes. Moore must find a renegade android aboard a nuclear submarine.

infolabels.title: Westworld Destroyed
infolabels.plot: After the events of Westworld, John Moore is assigned to hunt down Simon Quaid who has made off with a collection of androids for his own dangerous purposes. Moore must find a renegade android aboard a nuclear submarine.

items.title: S01E02 - My Brother's Keeper
items.summary: Quaid blackmails an owner of the Stoner Oil company for the company's profits. John and Pamela must find the android in the company's ranks before Quaid can win.

infolabels.title: My Brother's Keeper
infolabels.plot: Quaid blackmails an owner of the Stoner Oil company for the company's profits. John and Pamela must find the android in the company's ranks before Quaid can win.

items.title: S01E03 - Sound of Terror
items.summary: Quaid steals uranium from a nuclear power plant. John and Pamela must find the robot in a rock band before it can be used to build a bomb.

infolabels.title: Sound of Terror
infolabels.plot: Quaid steals uranium from a nuclear power plant. John and Pamela must find the robot in a rock band before it can be used to build a bomb.

items.title: S01E04 - The Lion
items.summary: An experimental car explodes and Westworld circuitry is discovered in the wreckage. John and the Delos team must determine Quaid's latest scheme.

infolabels.title: The Lion
infolabels.plot: An experimental car explodes and Westworld circuitry is discovered in the wreckage. John and the Delos team must determine Quaid's latest scheme.

items.title: S01E05 - Take-over
items.summary: A police captain that is in charge of a state governor's visit is Quaid's target. John and Pamela must stop Quaid's efforts and must locate the robot among the many police officers protecting the governor.

infolabels.title: Take-over
infolabels.plot: A police captain that is in charge of a state governor's visit is Quaid's target. John and Pamela must stop Quaid's efforts and must locate the robot among the many police officers protecting the governor.
